methods.doc: Continuously poll and process PENDING_DESIGN tasks until stop() is called.

methods.name: stop
methods.doc: Signal the consumer to stop after the current poll cycle.

methods.name: _start_async_loop
methods.doc: Start a background daemon thread running an asyncio event loop.

methods.name: _stop_async_loop
methods.doc: Stop the background event loop and join the thread.
